feat.name: Skill Mastery
feat.text: Increase your proficiency rank in one of your skills from expert to master and in another of your skills from trained to expert. You gain a skill feat associated with one of the skills you chose.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.

feat.prerequisite: *Investigator Dedication*; trained in at least one skill and expert in at least one skill
feat.special: You can select this feat up to five times.
